title: pilosella galiciana
intro: Pilosella galiciana, also known as the Galician mouse-ear, is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosella galiciana include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Pilosella galiciana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its potential health benefits.
